input.cmd: /bin/zsh -lc "docker exec sreft-web sh -c 'command -v curl || command -v busybox || command -v nc || ls /bin /usr/bin | head -80'"
/bin/zsh -lc 'curl -i --max-time 3 http://127.0.0.1:8083/ready || true; curl -i --max-time 3 http://127.0.0.1:8083/readiness || true; curl -i --max-time 3 http://127.0.0.1:8083/ || true'
/bin/zsh -lc 'for i in 1 2 3; do curl -fsS --max-time 3 http://127.0.0.1:8083/orders; echo; done'
